title: A New World Order Based on Natural Law — Panel One
description:
Dennis Speed —"Lyndon LaRouche Speaks: A Talent Well Spent"

27:06 Jacques Cheminade, president of the French party, Solidarité & Progrès — "The Coming World of Lyndon LaRouche"

1:16:03 John Gong, Professor of Economics at the University of International Business and Economics, Beijing — “Chinese Investment and American Infrastructure under the new Sino-US relations”

1:42:06 H.E. Ambassador Vassily A. Nebenzia, Ambassador and Permanent Representative of The Russian Federation to the United Nations, presented by Counsellor Theodore Strzhizhovskiy, Mission of The Russian Federation to the UN  — “Prospects for East-West Collaboration: The Russian Federation’s View”

1:50:33 William Binney, Former Technical Director, National Security Agency (NSA), USA

2:16:50 Jason Ross, Schiller Institute co-author “Extending the New Silk Road to West Asia and Africa” — “The Urgent Need for a New Paradigm in Africa”

2:32:41 Dennis Small, Executive Intelligence Review Ibero-America Editor — “Justice for the World: Why Donald Trump Must Exonerate Lyndon LaRouche Now”

Q&A Session
